Uses of Record Class
org.ddolib.examples.pdptw.TimeWindow

Packages that use TimeWindow
Package
Description
org.ddolib.examples.pdptw
This package contains the implementation of the One vehicle Pickup and Delivery Problem with Time Window (PDPTW) it has two twists: - it only supports one vehicle because DDO-like solvers have this limitation - it can incorporate unrelated nodes that are not within a pickup/delivery pair of node.

  • Uses of TimeWindow in org.ddolib.examples.pdptw

    Description
     
    PDPTWProblem(double[][] timeMatrix, HashMap<Integer,Integer> pickupToAssociatedDelivery, int maxCapa, TimeWindow[] timeWindows, Optional<Double> aKnownSolutionValue, Boolean strengthenTimeWindows)
    Constructs a PDPTWProblem from a distance matrix, a map of pickup-delivery pairs, and a maximum vehicle capacity.
